caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a bow tie, glasses, and a large, grey, pointed wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a poster with the text "LEE". On the screen, logos and text appear, including "BOSS TALK 101" and a circular logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expressions shift as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his head slightly tilting. The lighting and background remain constant throughout the clip, focusing on the man's dialogue and comedic appearance.
